name: HyUnion Holding Co.,Ltd
summary: HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automobile parts, special vehicles, electrical machines, and electromechanical components primarily in China. It also provides financial information, third-party payment, big data risk control, trans-border, and telephone operator charge settlement services. The company was formerly known as Qingdao Haili Metal One Co., Ltd. and changed its name to HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. in August 2017. HyUnion Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Qingdao, China.
